summary: Tested Kurate homepage feature end-to-end. Backend /api/homepage/stats returns valid live data (10.7k papers, 21 categories, 280.2k matches, 3 judges). Homepage renders at clean / URL with all 15 sections. Leaderboard correctly renders at /?period=recent. Navbar logo navigates back to homepage. Navbar 'Leaderboard' link routes to leaderboard. FAQ accordion clickable. All 5 social footer links present (X, LinkedIn, GitHub, Instagram, Facebook). Homepage footer visible, default app footer hidden on homepage but shown on /methodology. Mobile responsive layout works. No new console errors related to the homepage; only pre-existing CSP blocks for external analytics (gtag/reddit/twitter/plausible/cloudflare beacon) and one 401 (auth check). Top ranked papers preview also rendered with real data.

issues: External analytics scripts (gtag, reddit pixel, twitter uwt, plausible, cloudflare beacon) blocked by CSP — pre-existing, unrelated to homepage feature but worth knowing

critical_code_review_comments: HomePage.jsx is ~620 lines and uses many inline section definitions; consider splitting into smaller sub-components (Hero, Metrics, HowItWorks, etc.) for maintainability if growth continues.
HomeOrLeaderboard wrapper in App.js duplicates the param check that AppRouter performs for isHomePage — could be DRYed into a single helper hook (e.g. useIsHomepage()).
Helmet sets canonical to https://kurate.org and og:image to /kurate-logo.png — ensure these are correct for production domain (currently looks intentional).
homepage.py: returns 200 with zeroed payload on exception — consider returning 500 or HTTPException so frontend can show a clear error state instead of silently rendering '—'.
test_credentials: Admin password: papersumo2025; user: test@kurate.org / test1234 (not required for homepage tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Homepage at clean / works. Leaderboard activates whenever any of cat/period/tags/q/archive/tagMode/tagOpen/sort query params present. Default app footer visible only on non-homepage routes. Mini ranking preview and Live research pulse depend on stats.top_papers which is populated from db. Preview DB shows recent_papers=0 because data is older than 7 days — this is expected per problem statement.
